method: External HTML test page (file:///tmp/qfinhub-embed-verification.html) + direct browser navigation verification
overall_result: PASS — All embed routes load in external iframes. No X-Frame-Options or CSP blocking errors.

embeds_tested.name: Mortgage Affordability Widget Embed

iframe_loads.detail: Iframe loads in external test page (origin null). No load error event.

no_blank_frame.detail: Calculator UI renders: heading 'Mortgage Affordability 🏠', income allocation chart, input fields (income $85k, debt $500, down 20%, rate 7%, term 30yr)

no_x_frame_options_error.detail: Zero console errors. No X-Frame-Options: DENY messages.

no_csp_frame_ancestors_error.detail: CSP: frame-ancestors * confirmed via curl headers. No CSP errors in console.

responsive_display.detail: Calculator renders with full input fields, chart, and Powered by QFINHUB link.

calculator_interaction.detail: Interactive inputs visible: textboxes for income/debts, slider for down payment, spinbutton for term. Chart renders.

no_signup_data_issue.detail: No signup gate. Calculator loads immediately. Client-side only.

embed_code_copy_paste_works.detail: Standard iframe HTML tag works. Copy/paste from Phase 24 verified.

embeds_tested.notes: Embed includes full site footer + consent banner (not minimal). Calculator is functional but iframe is cluttered with footer/consent/PWA prompt. Medium priority cosmetic issue — does not block outreach.

embeds_tested.name: Debt Snowball vs Avalanche Widget Embed

iframe_loads.detail: Iframe loads in external test page. No load error.

no_blank_frame.detail: Calculator UI renders: 'Debt Payoff Calculator 💪', debt balance chart, inputs (Total Debt $15k, Rate 18%, Payment $500, Extra $0).

responsive_display.detail: Full calculator with chart and inputs renders.

calculator_interaction.detail: Inputs: Total Debt, Interest Rate, Monthly Payment, Extra Monthly Payment. All interactive.

embeds_tested.notes: Same footer/consent clutter as mortgage embed. Functional but not minimal.

embeds_tested.name: Widget API Embed (Mortgage)

calculator_interaction.detail: Shows placeholder text only — 'Interactive calculator loading or available on qfinhub.com/calculators/...'. No interactive calculator component. This is a static HTML page without React components.

embeds_tested.notes: Clean minimal embed (no footer/consent) but NO interactive calculator. Use /embed/[slug] routes for outreach — they have functional calculators.

recommended_for_outreach: /embed/mortgage-affordability and /embed/debt-payoff (interactive calculators, verified working in external iframes)
known_issues: Embed pages include full site footer, consent banner, PWA prompt — not the minimal embed layout intended. Cosmetic, not blocking.
/widgets/embed/[slug] route is clean but non-interactive (placeholder only).
Consider stripping footer/consent from /embed/* pages for cleaner publisher experience.
gate_decision: PASS — embeds work. Outreach may proceed.
